scripts.test:api: uv run --with pytest --with fastapi --with httpx python -m pytest tests/api -q
scripts.test:e2e:ipad: node scripts/utils/run-playwright.js test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --project="iPad Pro Safari"
scripts.test:e2e:apple-display: node scripts/utils/run-playwright.js test tests/e2e/apple-display-compat.spec.js --project="iPhone 17 Pro Max Chrome"
scripts.test:e2e:apple-display:safari: node scripts/utils/run-playwright.js test tests/e2e/apple-display-compat.spec.js --project="iPhone 17 Pro Max Safari"
scripts.qa:smoke: start-server-and-test "STRICT_PORT=1 PORT=4000 npm run dev" http://127.0.0.1:4000 "CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run test:e2e:chrome -- --workers=1"
scripts.qa:smoke:mobile: start-server-and-test "STRICT_PORT=1 PORT=4000 npm run dev" http://127.0.0.1:4000 "CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run test:e2e:mobile-chrome"
scripts.qa:browser:ci: start-server-and-test "STRICT_PORT=1 PORT=4000 npm run dev" http://127.0.0.1:4000 "CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run test:e2e:chrome && CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run test:a11y:chrome"
scripts.qa:a11y: start-server-and-test "STRICT_PORT=1 PORT=4000 npm run dev" http://127.0.0.1:4000 "CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run test:a11y:chrome"
scripts.qa:lighthouse:desktop: npm run build && start-server-and-test "PORT=4174 node scripts/utils/serve-dist.js" http://localhost:4174 "node scripts/deployment/lighthouse-gate.js --url=http://localhost:4174 --form-factor=desktop --min-performance=80 --min-accessibility=90 --min-best-practices=90 --min-seo=90"
scripts.qa:lighthouse:mobile: npm run build && start-server-and-test "PORT=4175 node scripts/utils/serve-dist.js" http://localhost:4175 "node scripts/deployment/lighthouse-gate.js --url=http://localhost:4175 --form-factor=mobile --min-performance=60 --min-accessibility=90 --min-best-practices=90 --min-seo=90"
scripts.qa:lighthouse:ci: npm run build && start-server-and-test "PORT=4174 node scripts/utils/serve-dist.js" http://127.0.0.1:4174 "node scripts/deployment/lighthouse-gate.js --url=http://127.0.0.1:4174 --form-factor=desktop --min-performance=80 --min-accessibility=90 --min-best-practices=90 --min-seo=90 && node scripts/deployment/lighthouse-gate.js --url=http://127.0.0.1:4174 --form-factor=mobile --min-performance=60 --min-accessibility=90 --min-best-practices=90 --min-seo=90"
scripts.qa:vercel:chrome: TEST_TARGET=vercel node scripts/utils/run-playwright.js test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --project="Desktop Chrome"
scripts.qa:vercel:safari: TEST_TARGET=vercel node scripts/utils/run-playwright.js test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --project="Desktop Safari"
scripts.qa:vercel:mobile: TEST_TARGET=vercel node scripts/utils/run-playwright.js test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --project="iPhone 14 Safari"
scripts.qa:github:chrome: TEST_TARGET=github node scripts/utils/run-playwright.js test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --project="Desktop Chrome"
scripts.qa:github:safari: TEST_TARGET=github node scripts/utils/run-playwright.js test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --project="Desktop Safari"
scripts.qa:dev:chrome: TEST_TARGET=dev node scripts/utils/run-playwright.js test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --project="Desktop Chrome"
scripts.qa:dev:safari: TEST_TARGET=dev node scripts/utils/run-playwright.js test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --project="Desktop Safari"
scripts.qa:cross-browser: npm run test:e2e:chrome && npm run test:e2e:safari && npm run test:e2e:firefox && npm run test:e2e:mobile-chrome && npm run test:e2e:mobile-safari
scripts.qa:visual: start-server-and-test "STRICT_PORT=1 PORT=4000 npm run dev" http://127.0.0.1:4000 "CI=1 VISUAL_TESTING=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run test:e2e:chrome"
scripts.qa:visual:ci: start-server-and-test "STRICT_PORT=1 PORT=4000 npm run dev" http://127.0.0.1:4000 "CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run qa:visual"
scripts.qa:cross-browser:local: start-server-and-test "STRICT_PORT=1 PORT=4000 npm run dev" http://127.0.0.1:4000 "CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run test:e2e:share:chrome && CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run test:e2e:share:safari && CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run test:e2e:rich-markdown:chrome && CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run test:e2e:rich-markdown:safari"
scripts.qa:chrome: npm run qa:browser:ci && npm run qa:lighthouse:ci
scripts.qa:prod-ready: npm run security-check && npm run lint && npm run lint:css && npm test && npm run test:api && npm run qa:chrome
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run lint:css && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run test:api
scripts.pre-commit: npm run security-check && npm run lint
